full_text:
Zheng Mao (Linshu) 鄭袤 (林叔)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zheng Mao (鄭袤), styledLinshu (林叔), was born in Henan. Close adviser to Sima Shi, warns friend against Wei Feng. Literary advisor to Cao Zhi. Zheng Mao was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty. Zheng Mao lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
